name: Linda Creed
abstract: Linda Diane Creed (December 6, 1948 – April 10, 1986), also known by her married name Linda Epstein, was an American songwriter, lyricist, background singer and record producer who teamed up with Thom Bell to produce some of the most successful Philadelphia soul groups of the 1970s.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Buckingham,
about_quotes.evidence: I called Linda Creed in Philadelphia and I said, “I’m working on this thing” with so-and-so... And she said, “How far are you into it?”
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Buckingham, interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 25, 2019 [interview 1 of 2]
